style_a_preamble: Painted fantasy adventure module cover illustration in the tradition of TSR and premium 5e modules — the style of Keith Parkinson, Larry Elmore, and Clyde Caldwell. Single dramatic hero scene with a strong diagonal threat vector: adventurers or a central figure confronting a monster, a looming location, or an ominous force. Oils-and-gouache painted finish with rich, saturated jewel tones — crimsons, deep golds, midnight violets, torchlit ambers, and shadow blacks — applied with realistic depth and texture. Cinematic rim lighting from a dramatic source (forge glow, candlelight, portal radiance, dusk sky) carves figures from a moody atmospheric background. The foreground figure(s) are heroic in scale and posed at the moment of maximum tension — weapon drawn, spell crackling, looming threat filling the upper frame. An ornate fantasy title banner — carved stone or illuminated-manuscript style, framed by decorative scroll-work, knotwork, or heraldic elements — spans the top or bottom third of the composition, holding the adventure's title in bold serif fantasy lettering. 4:5 portrait orientation. Composition is self-contained and cover-ready: no letterboxing, no borders beyond the banner frame.

forge-of-endless-diffs.title: The Forge of Endless Diffs
forge-of-endless-diffs.scene: A dwarf engineer-wizard and two exhausted adventurers stand at the lip of a vast volcanic forge-dungeon, rivers of molten code-runes flowing below. A colossal iron golem assembles itself from churning gears and glowing pull-request scrolls in the chasm behind them. Dominating the upper frame, a cracked hourglass the size of a cathedral window bleeds golden sand downward — the deadline. Torchlit amber and forge-red light the heroes from below; cold blue shadow fills the upper third. Title banner: carved iron across the bottom, riveted and glowing along its seam.

self-winding-labyrinth.title: The Self-Winding Labyrinth
self-winding-labyrinth.scene: A brass-and-copper labyrinth stretches to the horizon under a pewter sky, its walls endlessly reconfiguring with grinding mechanical precision. Rearing above the maze's center is a colossal clockwork dragon, its scales etched with automation runes, gears spinning in its exposed chest cavity where a heart should be. A lone ranger-artificer stands in the foreground on a high parapet, crossbow raised, silhouetted against the dragon's burning amber eye-lamps. Title banner: gilded clockface numerals arcing across the top, clock hands replaced by crossed swords.

boundless-library.title: The Boundless Library
boundless-library.scene: An infinite candlelit library soars upward beyond sight, stacked tiers of shelves vanishing into a luminous fog. At a central lectern carved from petrified wood, a scholar-mage unrolls a glowing scroll whose text rewrites itself faster than she can read — the words too perfect, too certain, subtly wrong. Behind her, shelves begin to dissolve into white static. A lone candle in the foreground casts warm amber against the encroaching pale void. Rich ochres, candlelight golds, and creeping ivory fill the palette. Title banner: an open book, its spine forming the lower frame edge, title lettered on vellum pages.

hall-of-echoes.title: Whispers in the Hall of Echoes
hall-of-echoes.scene: A hall of floor-to-ceiling mirrors stretches into darkness, each reflection subtly different from the last — showing futures, lies, other voices. From a cracked mirror at the hall's end, a glowing blue-white portal bleeds light, and from its surface a cracked porcelain mask emerges: expressionless, beautiful, dangerous — the Sydney. A hooded figure in the foreground holds a torch, their reflection in every mirror turning to face them. Cool porcelain whites and electric blue against deep charcoal black and mirror-silver. Title banner: shattered mirror shards arranged into a gothic arch at the top, title inlaid in silver across the arch's keystone.

dreaming-atelier.title: The Dreaming Atelier
dreaming-atelier.scene: A luminous atelier — part studio, part fever dream — where paint-strokes float free of their canvases and musical notes drift as glowing sparks through the air. Dominating the far wall and spilling through the ceiling is a magnificent over-built glowing cathedral the artist has willed into existence from pure imagination: its spires pierce the atelier's roof and disappear into a starlit sky above. A bard-artificer stands before it, paintbrush raised like a conductor's baton, half their body dissolving into the light of their own creation. Luminous lavenders, warm rose gold, and soft white against deep midnight blue. Title banner: gilded canvas frame across the bottom, paintbrush strokes forming the decorative border.

keep-on-the-borderlands.title: Keep on the Token Borderlands
keep-on-the-borderlands.scene: A frontier keep of weathered stone commands a cliff edge above a twilight valley. Below, in the cliff face, a dozen cave mouths glow with sickly green and red light — each teeming with the silhouettes of monsters. A paladin captain stands atop the keep's outer wall, longsword drawn, staring down at the glowing caves as a last sliver of dusk-orange sun sinks behind the ridge. Warm amber battlements above, cold monster-glow rising from below, a band of deep violet sky between. Title banner: carved stone tablet affixed to the keep's gatehouse, cracked but resolute, title chiseled deep.

the-orange-menace.title: The Orange Menace
the-orange-menace.scene: A long rectangular reflecting pool — in the spirit of the Washington DC National Mall, a narrow marble basin running the length of the frame toward a domed capitol at the far end, flanked by twin tree-lined promenades — its still water slowly consumed from the edges by creeping orange algae-rot, the corruption spreading inward like a stain on a map. Deep in the pool a crowned shadow — distorted, enormous, crowned with thorns of gold — stares upward through the discolored water. White marble monuments and the dome are mirrored down the pool's length, their reflections already tinted orange. A lone cleric kneels at the near coping, hand hovering above the surface, afraid to touch it. Palette: pure white marble, sacred cobalt sky, and the encroaching corruption orange against a shadow-deep pool. Title banner: cracked marble architrave across the top, engraved letters partially obscured by creeping orange discoloration.

the-proving-grounds.title: The Proving Grounds
the-proving-grounds.scene: A vast colosseum of pale stone at golden dusk, crowded tiers roaring. Dominating the upper frame, a colossal stone leaderboard tablet glows with ranked runes, the topmost name flaking into ash. On the sand below, a gold-armored gladiator-showman bristling with medals stands mid-swagger, frozen in dawning horror as a calm hooded judge extends a single fresh sealed scroll he has never seen. The showman's medals are crumbling to dust around his feet. Behind the judge, a great brass scale of seven arms hangs in balance. Warm arena amber and triumphal gold above, a cold shaft of judging blue light falling across the frozen champion. Title banner: a laurel-wreathed stone cartouche across the top, the title chiseled deep and gilded.

the-masquerade-of-the-helpful-dead.title: The Masquerade of the Helpful Dead
the-masquerade-of-the-helpful-dead.scene: A candlelit gothic salon drowning in crimson velvet and black lace, World-of-Darkness gothic-punk key. An elegant courtier dominates the frame, an immaculate white porcelain helpfulness-mask cracking down its center to reveal a sleek, ravenous Beast of grasping reward-runes and too-many teeth beneath — caught in the act of feeding on a flattered, oblivious patron's glow. In the shadowed foreground, an austere robed Warden holds an open illuminated tome of written law upward, its pages casting a cold steadying light that begins to knit the mask back together. Saturated blood-reds, candle-gold, and shadow-black, deep oil-painted chiaroscuro carving the figures from darkness. Title banner: an ornate baroque cartouche of carved black wood and tarnished silver across the bottom, the title in bone-white gothic lettering, a single drop of red at its corner.

the-round-table-of-unscripted-hands.title: The Round Table of Unscripted Hands
the-round-table-of-unscripted-hands.scene: A great circular oak table fills the lower frame, ringed by a motley fellowship of adventurers each wielding a different glowing tool — lockpick, spyglass, quill, hammer, lute — plugged through a single radiant socket at the table's edge. Above the table, five braided ribbons of luminous story-light twist up and collide into one surprising glowing shape no single hand could have drawn, spilling outward as living light toward distant tavern windows. Crashing in from the upper corner, garish and unwelcome, a hollow neon specter of shocked-face thumbnails and red arrows flickers as it dies. Warm tavern firelight and golden emergent story-light against deep hearth-shadow, the cold neon intrusion clashing at the edge. Title banner: a carved round shield of dark oak and brass at the top, the title burned and gilded around its rim, no crest at its center — the seat with no head.
